# Assessment Overview

This directory contains supplementary assessment documents generated for this report.

## Available Documents

- [architecture-diagram.md](./architecture-diagram.md) - Application and component-level architecture diagrams.
- [dependency-map.md](./dependency-map.md) - External dependency inventory grouped by category.
- [api-service-contracts.md](./api-service-contracts.md) - Service catalog, API endpoints, and communication sequence.
- [data-architecture.md](./data-architecture.md) - Persistence model, ownership boundaries, and ER diagram.
- [configuration-inventory.md](./configuration-inventory.md) - Configuration sources, profiles, secrets, and runtime settings.
- [business-workflows.md](./business-workflows.md) - Domain workflows, business rules, and workflow sequence.
